subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto him whom tribulation hath touched in the path of God, that the words of his Lord may sever him from all else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی مسته الباساء فی سبیل الله لینقطعه کلمات ربه عما
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @high station of the true believer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
